name: Turkey-Barley Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a soup pot or slow cooker.
2. Cook over low heat in the slow cooker for 6 hours, or simmer on the stove for 1 hour, until carrots are tender and barley is soft.
